fields.helpText: The ACCOUNT NUMBER field contains the account number for each cost  account as defined in the CDR Handbook issued annually.
The NAME field contains a descriptive title for the Cost Distribution Report (CDR) ACCOUNT NUMBER field.
The TYPE field contains a designator for various kinds of CDR accounts  (i.e., N for NORMAL ACCOUNT, R for RESEARCH, E for EDUCATION, or P for  PASS THROUGH).

fields.setOfCodes: 1:MEDICAL;2:SURGICAL;3:PSYCHIATRIC;4:VA NURSING HOME;5:INTERMEDIATE CARE;6:OUTPATIENT CARE;7:NON-VA FACILITIES;8:MISC BENEFITS & SVC;9:DOMICILIARY CARE;10:PSYCH RESIDENTIAL REHAB;11:INTERSTATION TRANS;12:SPEC INTEREST PROGRAMS;
fields.helpText: The CATEGORY field refers to the cost account series headings (e.g.,  MEDICAL, SURGICAL, etc.).

The ACTIVE field contains 0 for INACTIVE or 1 for ACTIVE.  Because entries in the CDR ACCOUNT file are pointed to by the CDR ACCOUNT field in the A&SP CLINIC VISIT file, entries should not be deleted. CDR account numbers which are not to be used should be marked as inactive.
